name: Redding Sports Ltd Ski and Board Swap
date: Annual — weekend before Thanksgiving (typically late November)
description: Large two-day ski and snowboard consignment swap at Redding Sports Ltd; public can buy or sell. Shop helps price and tag gear; ~20% commission on check payouts.

name: Redding Sports Ltd Bike Swap
date: Annual — spring (often mid-May)
description: Annual one-day bike swap at Redding Sports Ltd where the shop assesses and sells customer bikes during a big community sale day.

name: Redding Adventure Hub Bike Swap
date: Community parking-lot swap (hosted Small Business Saturday Nov 2024; verify recurrence)
description: Community bike parts and gear swap in the shop parking lot; vendors set up tables while the shop offers deals on new and used bikes.

name: Plumas Ski Club Ski Swap
date: Annual — mid/late November (2025: Nov 22)
description: Community ski/snowboard swap at Johnsville Ski Bowl lodge supporting Plumas Ski Club hill revitalization; 20% commission, cash preferred on-site.

name: Pleasant Valley Ski Team Ski Swap
organizer: Pleasant Valley High School Ski and Snowboard Team
date: Annual — beginning of school year / fall
description: Fundraising ski/snowboard gear swap hosted by the PVHS race team (historically partnered with Hughes Ski Hut and Chico High ski clubs).

name: Bike Month Humboldt Gear Swap
date: Annual — May (during Bike Celebration & Expo)
description: Gear swap held as part of the free Bike Celebration & Expo at Jefferson Community Center during Bike Month Humboldt.

name: Chico Velo Fall Bike Party Gear Swap
date: Annual — fall (fundraiser / Fall Bike Party)
description: Community bike gear swap as part of Chico Velo Fall Bike Party fundraiser; RSVP required to sell or trade, open to shoppers.

name: Santa Cruz Fly Fishing Club Swap Meet
date: Annual — May (2026: May 16, 9am–1pm at Aptos Grange)
description: Outdoor/fishing swap meet at Aptos Grange parking lot — buy, sell, trade fishing and outdoors gear; free member vendor spaces, small fee for non-members.

name: Mount Shasta Ski and Snowboard Swap
date: Historically early November — verify current year
description: Community ski/snowboard swap historically co-hosted by Sportsmen's Den and The Fifth Season with drop-off at both shops ahead of a Saturday sale day.

name: Eureka Bike Kitchen
organizer: Eureka Bike Kitchen / Redwood Community Action Agency
date: Ongoing community bike kitchen (earn-a-bike / recycled bikes)
description: Community bike kitchen at Jefferson Community Center providing tools, repair knowledge, and affordable/recycled bikes via earn-a-bike volunteering.

name: The Bike Church
organizer: The Bike Church / Hub for Sustainable Living
date: Ongoing community bike shop since 1998 (used bikes + DIY repair)
description: Community bicycle shop and tool collective with sliding-scale shop time, affordable used/new parts, used bikes for sale, and donated kids bikes.

name: Santa Cruz Bike Co-op
date: Ongoing campus co-op (closed during academic breaks)
description: Student-run nonprofit cooperative bike shop offering repairs, used bikes, tools, and education at UCSC Redwood Building.

name: Pullins Cyclery Bike Consignment
date: Ongoing shop consignment of used bikes
description: Historic downtown Chico bike shop offering new/used bikes, full service repairs, and consignment sales.

name: Humboldt Bay Bicycle Commuters Association
date: Ongoing advocacy; partners on Bike Month swaps/events
description: Long-running Humboldt Bay cycling advocacy group that helps organize Bike Month events including historic bike/gear swaps.

name: Play It Again Sports Chico
date: Ongoing buy/sell/trade sports equipment
description: Locally owned used sports and fitness reseller buying and selling team sports, bikes, snowboards, disc golf, and more year-round.

name: Play It Again Sports Soquel
date: Ongoing buy/sell/trade; ski/snowboard service in winter
description: Long-running Monterey Bay used sports retailer for surf, team sports, skis/snowboards, bikes-adjacent gear, and fitness equipment.

name: Santa Cruz Gear Exchange
date: Ongoing hike/bike/climb/surf consignment thrift
description: Downtown Santa Cruz secondhand and consignment shop for outdoor gear — hiking, biking, climbing, surf, camping.

name: Hughes Ski Hut Community Ski Swap
date: Annual fall community ski swap (historically benefiting Chico/PV HS teams)
description: Chico ski/snowboard shop that has long hosted community ski swaps benefiting local high school ski and snowboard programs.

name: Mt. Shasta Ski and Snowboard Team Gear Swap
organizer: Mt. Shasta Ski & Snowboard Team (MSST / MSRA)
date: Ongoing online community gear swap board
description: Team-run alpine gear swap board where members and friends post skis, boards, boots, and race gear for sale or needed.

name: Chico High Ski and Snowboard Team
organizer: Chico High School Ski & Snowboard Team
date: Seasonal fundraisers (historically co-benefited from Hughes/community ski swap)
description: Chico High ski/snowboard race team that has historically benefited from community ski swaps and runs its own fundraising (e.g. Almond Bowl).

name: Once Upon A Child Chico
date: Ongoing kids clothing/toys/baby gear buy-sell
description: Locally owned kids resale store buying and selling clothing, toys, and baby/kids gear for cash on the spot — PNW-style kids gear channel.

name: Once Upon A Child Redding
date: Ongoing kids clothing/toys/baby gear buy-sell
description: Kids thrift/resale store in Redding buying and selling gently used children's clothing, toys, and baby gear.

name: Wren and Rhino Kids Sale
date: Spring and Fall kids consignment sales (Santa Cruz County Fairgrounds)
description: Seasonal children's consignment sale at Santa Cruz County Fairgrounds covering kids clothing, toys, and gear for Santa Cruz/Monterey Bay families.

name: Monterey Peninsula Barter Fair
date: Recurring community barter fairs (e.g. March 2026 at El Gabilan Library)
description: Community barter fair for exchanging goods without cash — library-hosted Monterey Peninsula events.

name: Sierra Steel Harley Car and Bike Show Swap Meet
date: Periodic dealership car/bike show with swap meet (e.g. June)
description: Harley dealership event featuring a car and bike show with swap meet component in Chico.

name: Sportsmen's Den Used Snow Sports
date: Ongoing shop; historically hosts/participates in ski swaps
description: Mount Shasta snowboard/ski shop that buys/sells winter sports gear and has co-hosted community ski & snowboard swaps.

name: The Fifth Season Outdoor Shop
date: Ongoing outdoor shop with rentals; historically co-hosts ski swap
description: Long-running Mount Shasta outfitter for climbing, skiing, hiking, and cycling; historically co-hosted community ski/snowboard swaps.

name: Ukiah Bicycle Kitchen
date: Ongoing Saturdays at Ukiah Farmers Market (weather permitting)
description: Mobile, pedal-powered community bike kitchen offering affordable repair education and refurbished bikes at the Ukiah Farmers Market.

name: Bike SLO County Bike Kitchen
date: Ongoing DIY bike kitchen and used bike/parts sales
description: Nonprofit community bike kitchen selling refurbished bikes and used parts and teaching DIY repair; open most days for shopping and DIY sessions.

name: The Switchback Used Outdoor Gear
date: Ongoing buyback and used outdoor gear consignment
description: Downtown SLO used outdoor gear shop with buyback program for apparel, footwear, and outdoor equipment; sister store to The Mountain Air.

name: Adventure's Edge Arcata
date: Ongoing outdoor shop (community bike-month partner historically)
description: Long-running Humboldt outdoor retailer (bike, paddle, climb, hike) that partners with local Bike Month and community cycling efforts in Arcata and Eureka.
